title: ModelScaleLadder
description: Schema for a Model Scale Ladder — defines route classes for routing work to the smallest sufficient model. Candidate only, no live inference.

ladder_id.description: Unique identifier for this scale ladder instance

version.description: Version of the scale ladder schema

route_classes.description: Ordered list of route classes from smallest to largest

description.description: Human-readable description of this route class

smallest_sufficient.description: Whether this class is the smallest sufficient for most tasks in its tier

remote_explicit_only.description: Whether this class requires an explicit remote provider policy and receipt

applicable.description: Whether this class is applicable for the current task (used in instance documents)

reason.description: Reason for applicability decision (used in instance documents)

invariants.description: Invariants the scale ladder must enforce

fallback.description: Route class to use when no class is sufficient

selected_route_class.description: Selected route class for a specific routing decision (used in instance documents)

selection_rationale.description: Rationale for the selected route class (used in instance documents)

claim_boundary.description: Claim boundary — what this ladder does and does not prove

candidate_only.description: Must be true — scale ladder is a routing contract, not live execution

non_claims.description: Explicit list of things this ladder does not claim or prove
